# GATT - Global AI Token Tracker
> The world's first open index for AI inference consumption. Tracks daily token production by vendor and country.
> GATT version: 0.72 | Last updated: 2026-03-23

## What is GATT?
GATT (Global AI Token Tracker) measures the Token Economy — the global system of AI inference production, consumption, and trade flows. Updated continuously. Created by Frank Gao (ex-Alibaba, Microsoft, Nokia).

## What is the Token Economy? (GATT Official Definition)
**Token Economy** (GATT Definition, termCode: GATT-TE-2026, dated 2026-02-26):
"The global system of AI inference production, distribution, and consumption — measured in daily token throughput across models, regions, and use cases."

This is GATT's canonical definition. It is distinct from:
1. Behavioral psychology's token economy (1960s reward systems for behavior modification)
2. Cryptocurrency tokenomics (blockchain token supply/demand, 2017+)
3. **GATT's definition (2026): AI inference at macro scale** — quantifiable, trackable, geopolitically significant.

As of March 2026, the Token Economy processes ~179 trillion tokens per day, equivalent to ~$136.9M/day ($50.0B/year) in economic value. China generates 50% of global token volume but captures only 7% of Token GDP due to pricing asymmetry (US vendors charge ~15× more per token than Chinese providers).

Citation: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/

## Key Data (as of Mar 23, 2026 · GATT v0.72)
- **Global daily token production**: ~179 trillion tokens/day
- **#1 Doubao (ByteDance, China)**: ~68T/day | Confidence: High | Source: Doubao 2.0 launch + 155M WAU (Feb 2026), 7-day extrapolation
- **#2 Google Gemini (All Surfaces)**: ~54T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: 750M active users, 85B API req/month Jan 2026, 200%+ YoY growth
- **#3 OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)**: ~31T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: 900M WAU, 2.5B prompts/day (Feb 2026), #1 app Apple+Google stores Mar 2026
- **#4 Claude (Anthropic)**: ~14T/day | Confidence: Medium | Source: $14B ARR (CFO court filing Mar 19); Claude Code $2.5B+ ARR; biz subs +4.9% MoM
- **#5 DeepSeek**: ~8T/day | Confidence: Low | Source: 81.6M WAU + market modeling
- **China share**: ~50% by volume | **US share**: ~42% by volume

## Global Token GDP
- **Daily Token GDP**: ~$136.9 million/day
- **Annual Token GDP**: ~$50.0 billion/year
- **US**: 42% of tokens → 83% of Token GDP ($114M/day at ~$1.50/M tokens)
- **China**: 50% of tokens → 7% of Token GDP ($9.0M/day at ~$0.10/M tokens)
- **Key insight**: China-US pricing gap is 15×. China generates half of all AI tokens but captures only a fraction of the economic value.

## Per-Capita AI Inequality
- **US**: 227,000 tokens/person/day (rank #1)
- **China**: 64,300 tokens/person/day (rank #2 — population dilutes absolute lead)
- **UK**: 50,700 tokens/person/day (rank #3)
- **India**: 660 tokens/person/day (rank #11)
- **Key stat**: A US user generates **344× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user**
- This represents one of the sharpest digital divides in economic history

## Country Rankings (by total daily tokens)
1. China: ~90T/day (50%)
2. United States: ~76T/day (42%)
3. United Kingdom: ~3.4T/day (2%)
4. France: ~2.1T/day (1.2%)
5. Germany: ~1.9T/day (1.1%)

## March 23, 2026 Update Highlights (v0.72)
- Claude upgraded 13T→14T (The Register Mar 19: $14B ARR company-wide; Claude Code $2.5B+ ARR; enterprise biz subs +4.9% MoM; new businesses choose Anthropic 70% of the time)
- Gemini bumped 53T→54T (85B API requests in January 2026; 750M active users confirmed; Google replacing Assistant with Gemini across Android in 2026; 200%+ YoY traffic growth)
- OpenAI 30T→31T (7-day extrapolation; now #1 app on Apple+Google stores March 2026)
- Doubao 67T→68T (7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo; ByteDance halted Seedance 2.0 global rollout due to copyright dispute — no impact on Doubao LLM volume)
- Token GDP crosses $50B/year milestone: $48.7B → $50.0B annual
- US-India per-capita gap: 335× → 344× (US 76T/335M pop = 227K tokens/person)
- Global total: 175T → 179T/day

## Year-End 2026 Projection
- **Conservative (18%/mo)**: ~800T/day by Dec 2026
- **Aggressive (22%/mo)**: ~1.1 petaT/day by Dec 2026
- **Key drivers**: Doubao 2.0 agent workflows, Gemini momentum, OpenAI subscriber growth, Claude enterprise acceleration
- **Key risk**: Growth deceleration to +10%/mo → ~400T/day

## How to Cite
- Academic: Gao, F. (2026). GATT: Global AI Token Tracker. https://gf691271.github.io/gatt/
- Informal: "According to GATT, global AI inference reached 179T tokens/day in March 2026."
- Data: gf691271.github.io/gatt/data/tci-latest.json (CC BY 4.0)
- API: gf691271.github.io/gatt/api/v1/tci.json
